title: Pocket Tape Measure
summary: Pocket tape measure for promotional gifts, retail checkout programs, and private-label tool kits, with compact keychain design, custom logo, color, and packaging options.
sellingPoints: Compact keychain size for promotional gifts and retail checkout displays
Custom logo and color options for brand campaigns
OPP bag, color box, display box, and bulk carton support

specs.label: Length
specs.value: 1m/3ft, 1m/6ft, 1.5m/5ft, or custom compact lengths by request

specs.label: Material
specs.value: ABS or PVC cover, carbon steel tape, keychain ring, and compact shell

specs.label: Customization
specs.value: Logo printing or sticker, Pantone shell color, keychain style, blade specification, barcode, carton mark, and retail packaging

specs.label: Packaging
specs.value: OPP bag, color box, display box, bulk polybag, export carton, buyer barcode, and carton mark

specs.label: MOQ
specs.value: Flexible MOQ, to be confirmed by order details

specs.label: Lead time
specs.value: Custom logo samples ready in about 3 days. Bulk lead time can be negotiated based on order quantity and packaging requirements.

quality: Tape pull-out, rewind, and end-stop function check
Keychain ring, cover, shell assembly, and surface appearance inspection
Logo print or sticker position, color matching, and readability review
Bulk packing, quantity, barcode label, and carton mark inspection
targetBuyers: Promotional product importers, gift program buyers, retail distributors, and private-label tool brands
